paths.name: @/lib/whatsapp/adapter-factory
paths.message: Business-initiated sends MUST go through @/lib/whatsapp/outbound-guard (sendBusinessInitiated) so the opt-out registry is enforced. Only outbound-guard.ts, adapter-factory.ts, and the reply-to-inbound paths may import the factory directly.

paths.name: @/lib/whatsapp/meta-adapter
paths.message: Never import a concrete adapter. Use the adapter factory (reply paths) or the outbound guard (business-initiated).

paths.name: @/lib/whatsapp/360dialog-adapter
paths.message: Never import a concrete adapter. Use the adapter factory (reply paths) or the outbound guard (business-initiated).
